title: Gloves of Thievery
excerpt: These gloves are imperceptible while worn. While wearing them, you gain a +5 bonus to Dexterity (sleight_of_hand|Sleight of Hand) checks....
markdown:
# Gloves of Thievery

These gloves are imperceptible while worn. While wearing them, you gain a +5 bonus to Dexterity ([[sleight_of_hand]]) checks.
